result.finding: runs/pfas-rice-oos-multidataset (digest sha256:68ebaf39..0b7207da): three variants transferred WITHOUT refit to independent datasets. Kim 2019 brown-rice grain BAF (excl. PFOA): lipid log10 RMSE 0.48 vs monotone 2.05 vs W2 1.07 -- a 1.57-log lipid-over-monotone margin; reliable subset (DF>=15%) 0.20 vs 1.92 vs 1.44. Lipid uniquely captures the Kim grain long-chain RISE the baselines structurally miss, and wins BOTH clean datasets (Tang 0.52 vs 1.23; Kim 0.48 vs 2.05). Pre-registered honest limits: Li 2025 is field/group-water/surface-confounded and inconclusive (W2 wins straw/root); Kim long chains are low-DF (3-13%).
